label: Emporio Italia
question: Is Bresaola €10 residual deterministic extraction bug, GPT variance, or GT issue?

verdict.label: GPT_variance
verdict.summary: €10 is reproducible only intermittently (1/5 v27 stability runs; 40% total stability). Pass C oscillates between copying VALOR 49,48 € correctly and synthesizing wrong totals (notably 39,48 ≈ qty×unit or near Ventricina 39,49). v26 single-run €0 was a lucky draw; historical pre-v26 and v23 runs show the same instability. GT total 49,48 matches visible invoice.

A_deterministic_extraction_bug.hypothesis: Every v27 invoke returns total 39.48 (€10 error)
evidence: v27-stability: 3/5 runs wrong with varying totals (44.83, 39.48, 45.29)
4 unique total values across 5 runs — not deterministic

B_gpt_variance.hypothesis: Pass C non-determinism on Emporio weight/discount rows
evidence: €10 exact on 1/5 runs (run 4) — same failure mode as v27 audit
v23: run1 total 49.48, run2 total 49.88 — historical variance
v26 official rerun €0 but pre-v26 lab rerun total 45.26
Qty/unit trade off when total correct (v26: 1.83×27.05≈49.48; stability: 2.5×19.79≈49.48)
Bad runs: total ≈ qty×unit (audit 2.38×16.64≈39.48) instead of VALOR 49,48
Same Emporio variance family as Gorgonzola (gorgonzola-root-cause)

C_gt_issue.hypothesis: GT total wrong vs visible invoice
evidence: Good runs (v26, refinement, 2/5 v27) all hit 49.48
GT qty 2.8 vs printed 1,83 is catalog normalization — does not explain €10 total error

failureModes: Possible digit bleed 49→39 or row-value confusion with Ventricina 39,49 € (same v27 audit extract)

v26Comparison.conclusion: v26 does not deterministically fix Bresaola — variance predates v27

confidenceRationale: 5-run probe directly disproves determinism; visible/GT total agreement; v23/v26 historical variance; 13% reserved for dual failure-mode ambiguity (bleed vs digit vs qty×unit).

promptActions: Emporio POSITIVE: Bresaola weight row — Qtd 1,83 · Preço Unit 33,80 · Desc 20,00 · Preço Total 49,48 → line_total_net 49.48
NEGATIVE: never emit 39,48 when Preço Total prints 49,48; distinguish from Ventricina row 39,49
Reinforce VALOR copy over qty×unit on discounted weight rows (extends v27 TOTAL COLUMN ISOLATION)
recommendedFix.expectedImprovementNote: Full €10 when total stabilizes to 49.48 every run. Current 40% stability → prompt hardening target 90%+; avg error would drop from €3.77 toward €0.
